formulary_status: PARTIAL — 6 issuers (Fidelis 25303 + Anthem 41046 + MVP 56184 + UHC 54235 + Excellus 40064+78124) parsed from PDFs. 19,399 drugs. Remaining 6 issuers need PDF parsing.

formulary.name: MetroPlus Marketplace Formulary
formulary.note: Web page at metroplus.org/members/pharmacy/ confirmed live (HTML). Actual PDF URLs need manual extraction from page. Per SBM-DATA-SOURCES.md: 3-tier formulary with PA/ST/QL/SGM flags.

independent_health.issuer_id_note: SBC PUF labels this issuer as 'AmeriHealth' but SBM registry identifies as Independent Health (NY). Verify correct carrier mapping.

fidelis_care.issuer_id_note: HIOS ID confirmed from Centene TiC index (88 plans with 25303NY* plan IDs). Previously listed as 16842 in some sources.

formulary.name: Ambetter from Fidelis Care QHP Formulary
formulary.note: QHP formulary PDF found at fideliscare.org/Portals/0/Formularies/. Parsed 2,591 drugs (245 preventive, 1,524 generic, 307 preferred brand, 515 non-preferred). PA=622, ST=29, QL=1,194. No JSON endpoint exists — Centene TiC index is TiC-only.

formulary.name: Excellus 3-Tier Open Formulary (2950)
formulary.note: Found via excellusbcbs.com/plans/individual/drug-list FormularyNavigator links. 5,789 drugs. Tiers: Generic=1,384, Preferred Brand=332, Non-Preferred=4,073. PA=1,629, ST=440, QL=1,881. Shared with HIOS 78124 (HealthNow BCBS WNY).

anthem_ny.issuer_name: Anthem Health Plans of New York (Elevance Health)

formulary.name: 2026 New York Select Drug List — Three Tier
formulary.note: Full Select Drug List PDF hosted on FormularyNavigator (FBO/143). 2,343 drugs parsed. Tiers: Generic=901, Preferred Brand=561, Non-Preferred=499, ACA Preventive=382. PA=415, ST=70, QL=1,367, SP=184. Elevance multi-state JSON index has no NY data (FFE only).

formulary.name: Anthem Insurance NY Formulary
formulary.note: Separate HIOS ID from 41046. No plans found in SBC PUF data — may be dental-only or inactive for individual market. No MRF endpoint found.

formulary.name: 2026 NY Individual & Family Prescription Drug List
formulary.note: Full NY Individual PDL (174 pages, 7.5 MB). 3,373 drugs parsed. Tiers: Generic=1,278, Preferred Brand=742, Non-Preferred=978, ACA Preventive=375. PA=642, ST=52, QL=1,632, SP=430. Found via uhc.com/member-resources/pharmacy-benefits/prescription-drug-lists/individual-exchange.

formulary.name: 2026 MVP Marketplace Pharmacy Formulary
formulary.note: Full Marketplace formulary PDF (284 pages, 1.9 MB). 6,163 drugs parsed. Tiers: Generic=2,011, Preferred Brand=1,706, Non-Preferred=2,446. PA=701, ST=89, QL=684, SP=470.

formulary.name: Unknown
formulary.note: HIOS ID 74289 not matched to a named carrier in SBM-DATA-SOURCES.md or SBC PUF data. May be a subsidiary or new entrant. Needs manual identification.

bcbs_ny.issuer_name: Blue Cross Blue Shield (NY — HealthNow / BCBS of WNY)

formulary.name: Excellus 3-Tier Open Formulary (2950) — shared with 40064
formulary.note: Shares formulary with Excellus BCBS (40064). Both are Excellus affiliates using the same 3-Tier Open Formulary via FormularyNavigator publisher 251.

formulary.name: EmblemHealth Formulary
formulary.note: MRF index URL returns error. EmblemHealth publishes TiC MRF only. No QHP formulary JSON endpoint found. emblemhealth.com/cms-data-index.json returns 404.

formulary.name: Healthfirst Formulary
formulary.note: drugs.json is live and accessible (12 MB, 3,972 drugs). However, all plan IDs are 36194FL* (Healthfirst Florida). NY QHP plans (HIOS 91237NY*) are NOT included. Healthfirst publishes JSON for their FL FFE business only, not NY SBE.

formulary.name: CDPHP Formulary
formulary.note: No MRF endpoint found. cdphp.com/machine-readable-files/cms-data-index.json returns 404. cdphp.com/cms-data-index.json returns 404.

formulary_summary.recommendation: 6 issuers parsed (Fidelis + Anthem + MVP + UHC + Excellus 40064+78124) covering 212 of 319 plans (66%) — 19,399 merged drugs. Remaining 6 issuers (107 plans): EmblemHealth (88582, 26), Healthfirst (91237, 25), CDPHP (94788, 30), MetroPlus (11177, 16), Independent Health (18029, 13).
